response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience spanning Node.js/TypeScript, React, and multiple backend languages, with recent direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq — matching both the core stack and the AI-agent requirement. Track record of ownership, TDD, and architecture work across diverse domains supports the senior IC profile.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js full-stack background with React experience
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling work matches a key requirement
Demonstrated engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, architecture ownership
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned; Java exposure is older and limited
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate stack preferences outside the primary stack
